title: Building for Release
description: Preparing and publishing to app stores.

slides.title: Publishing Your App 📱
slides.content:
# Release Preparation

**Android:**
* Create a keystore for signing.
* Configure `build.gradle` with signing config.
* Run `flutter build apk` or `flutter build appbundle`.
* Upload to Google Play Console.

**iOS:**
* Set up certificates and provisioning profiles in Xcode.
* Configure bundle identifier and version.
* Run `flutter build ios` and archive in Xcode.
* Upload to App Store Connect.

quizData.question: What is the purpose of a keystore on Android?

options.text: To sign the app for release

quizData.explanation: A keystore contains the private key used to sign your app.

slides.title: Build Commands
slides.codeSnippet:
# Android APK
flutter build apk --release

# Android App Bundle (preferred for Play Store)
flutter build appbundle

# iOS (builds an Xcode project; then archive in Xcode)
flutter build ios --release

# Check for issues before building
flutter analyze

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Add app icons and splash screens

Use `flutter_launcher_icons` and `flutter_native_splash` packages to easily generate icons and splash screens.
